task_objective: Update README for PyPI release, refresh screenshots with varied data, and fix related reporting bugs.
design_decisions: Updated README to reflect PyPI status ('ibis-profiling') and documented new interactive features (themes, search, alert filtering).
Fixed 'NoneType' errors in 'ProfileReport' when processing columns with 100% missing values (IQR, CV, percentage calculations).
Enhanced 'AlertEngine' to safely handle 'None' values for 'n_distinct', 'p_missing', and 'n_zeros'.

Refreshed all project screenshots using a new synthetic dataset with diverse statistical distributions (Normal, Skewed, Zeros-heavy, Concentrated Missingness) to better showcase analytical capabilities.
Ensured all image links in README use absolute GitHub URLs for correct rendering on PyPI.
results: README updated and polished for PyPI. Reporting engine is now more robust against empty/missing data. UI visuals updated with high-variance data.
